rule_text: Approved DTP CTA labels are short verb phrases in sentence case (not ALL CAPS), 1–3 words. Approved examples: "Explore IBSRELA", "Watch Regina's story", "Watch video", "Learn more about how IBSRELA is different", "Yes, I have".
intent: Keep DTP CTA labels short, action-oriented, and consistently cased.
summary: CTA labels must be short verb phrases, 1-3 words, in sentence case; examples include "Explore IBSRELA", "Watch video", "Learn more about how IBSRELA is different".
